result.stdout:
=============== VanillaTransformer 2.5.2.107 HELP ===============
=============== Parameter Group 1 ===============
  -a  --OutputArchivePath		Path to output archive
  -h  --PlaceholderPattern		String that define placeholders format. Every placeholder must contain KEY token. Example "${KEY}"
  -n  --ValuesProviderName		Name of the value provider
  -o  --OutputPath		Path to a output file
  -p  --PatternFile		Path to a file with configuration pattern
  -r  --ProjectRootPath		If not set, the path of the executable will be taken
  -s  --ValuesSource		Path to a file with values required by the pattern file
=============== Parameter Group 2 ===============
  -f  --ConfigurationFormat		Format of the transform configuration file. Available options
  -h  --PlaceholderPattern		String that define placeholders format. Every placeholder must contain KEY token. Example "${KEY}"
  -r  --ProjectRootPath		If not set, the path of the executable will be taken
  -t  --TransformConfiguration		Path to a file with transform configuration
